documents.title: PID-001 Demo Process Line
documents.summary: PID-001 is a simplified P&ID-style demo drawing showing a process line from Feed Line through V-101, P-101 Pump, C-201 Compressor, HX-301 Heat Exchanger, V-201, and Outlet Line. It includes FT-101 flow transmitter, PT-201 pressure transmitter, and TT-301 temperature transmitter.
